chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Before: Justice Muhammad Saleem Jessar Justice Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro CP No.D-201 of 2026 (Muhammad Raahim Laliwala v. Province of Sindh and 04 others) Petitioner present in person M/s. Sarfaraz Ali M. Abbasi and Idrees Abbasi, Advocates for Respondent No.2 Mr. Owais Jamal, Advocate for Respondent No.4 M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh Additional Advocate General and Sagheer Ahmed Abbasi Assistant Advocate General,, Sindh a/w M.Anwer Alam, Incharge PMDC, Karachi Date of hearing and order: 03.02.2026 ORDER NISAR AHMED BHANBHRO, J. Mr. Sarfaraz Ali M. Abbasi, Advocate files power on behalf of Respondent No.2 as well as Mr. Owais Jamal, Advocate also files power on behalf of Respondent No.4, which are taken on record. 2. This petition is disposed of in the following terms: i. The petitioner has applied for admission in MBBS program for Session 2025-26 and his name is mentioned in the impugned Selection List. Shaheed Mohtarma Benazir Bhutto Medical University Larkana shall consider the case of the petitioner for admission in accordance with the law and on merits. ii. If the petitioner is found eligible for admission, he shall be admitted in admission program for MBBS year 2025-2026. 3. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). Office to send a copy of this order to the Respondents No.1 and 2, for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENHCES Nadir*
